kept.text:
Jefferies expects $LLY ’s Foundayo sales to pick up when insurance coverage expands in mid May.

So far, Foundayo is behind $NVO 's oral Wegovy.

In week 3, Foundayo had ~5,600 prescriptions vs ~26,100 for Wegovy in its week 3.

Lilly says ~20,000 patients are already on treatment.

Despite the slower start, Jefferies still expects strong sales growth later this year.

kept.text:
📢 𝐉𝐔𝐒𝐓 𝐈𝐍: $LLY Lilly’s Omvoh Shows 𝟒-𝐘𝐞𝐚𝐫 Durable Disease Clearance in UC

👉 𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬:

➤  Lilly reports Omvoh achieves durable 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐜𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 over 𝟒 years.

➤  𝟔𝟑.𝟓% of patients maintained clearance after four years of treatment.

➤  Study marks first 𝐈𝐋-𝟐𝟑𝐩𝟏𝟗 therapy with long-term UC clearance data.

➤  Disease clearance includes 𝐬𝐲𝐦𝐩𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐜, endoscopic, and histologic remission.

➤  Over 𝟔𝟏% sustained most stringent remission criteria through four years.

➤  Data show low 𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐩𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐳𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 and zero UC-related surgeries reported.

➤  Safety profile consistent with no new 𝐬𝐚𝐟𝐞𝐭𝐲 𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐬 observed
